creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Thierry Thomas from comment #31)

Interesting, thanks for that. This appears to be a common bug in upstreams where a data_dir is added to the --record output. The best way to address this is to remove the entry (modify the .pymodtmp pkg-plist before its written), or fix the offending setup.py numpy/distutils issue
